allow: PowerShell($root = "C:\\Users\\dloza\\Documents\\Daniels project\\Stimulo\\Butaques\\legado-web"; $ds = "C:\\Users\\dloza\\Documents\\Daniels project\\Stimulo\\Butaques\\legado-design-system"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "$root\\assets\\css","$root\\assets\\js","$root\\assets\\img","$root\\assets\\fonts" | Out-Null; $fonts = @\("CormorantGaramond-Light.ttf","CormorantGaramond-LightItalic.ttf","CormorantGaramond-Regular.ttf","CormorantGaramond-Italic.ttf","CormorantGaramond-Medium.ttf","CormorantGaramond-MediumItalic.ttf","CormorantGaramond-SemiBold.ttf","CormorantGaramond-Bold.ttf","Inter-Regular.otf","Inter-Italic.otf","Inter-Medium.otf","Inter-SemiBold.otf","Inter-Bold.otf"\); foreach\($f in $fonts\){ Copy-Item "$ds\\fonts\\$f" "$root\\assets\\fonts\\$f" -Force }; Copy-Item "$ds\\assets\\logo-seal.jpg" "$root\\assets\\img\\logo-seal.jpg" -Force; Get-ChildItem -Recurse $root | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)
